title: Qualified ‘this’ in Kotlin
summary: The only thing we learnt about this pointer in other languages is “this is an implicit pointer which points to the calling object”. As clear from the definition, it points to the object which calls the respective function or property.
content: The only thing we learnt about this pointer in other languages is “this is an implicit pointer which points to the calling object”. As clear from the definition, it points to the object which calls the respective function or property.
